description: inspect an ONNX model file — print inputs/outputs/opset/IR/producer, unique operators, validity, and a machine-parseable input_name/height/width summary
rules: Read-only — never mutates the input ONNX file
The machine-parseable block emits exact lines (input_name:, height:, width:) that the engine-build phase greps; do not reword them
Dynamic spatial dims are reported as DYNAMIC (symbol=...) so callers know to set H/W manually in trtexec flags
usage: Set ONNX_FILE to the path of the .onnx model to inspect. Output: onnx-info.txt (human-readable report incl. the machine-parseable summary) and inspect-onnx.json (audit manifest with validity + report path).
limitation: Requires the `onnx` python package to produce real shape/opset/operator data; without it the perk degrades gracefully (empty report, valid=false). Inspection only — it does not modify, simplify, or convert the model.
